hero.subtitle: FinPay Africa's strength lies in its network. Together with our strategic partners across finance, technology, and commerce, we are building the payment infrastructure Africa truly deserves.

header.title: Our Partner Network
header.subtitle: A diverse ecosystem of financial institutions, technology providers, mobile operators, and merchants — united by a shared mission to transform African payments.

grid.emptyState: No partners found in this category yet.

cta.title: Become a FinPay Africa Partner
cta.body: We are always looking for forward-thinking organizations to grow with us. Whether you're a bank, fintech, mobile operator, or merchant network — there's a place for you in the FinPay Africa ecosystem.

compliance.title: Regulatory Compliance
compliance.desc: Operate under a certified, internationally compliant payment framework.

reach.title: Pan-African Reach
reach.desc: Access an established cross-border network spanning 12+ countries.

volume.title: Growing Volume
volume.desc: Plug into a platform processing thousands of transactions monthly.

brightlink.name: BrightLink Technologies
brightlink.description: BrightLink powers the card issuance infrastructure and payment APIs that underpin the Connect platform, enabling fast, secure transaction processing at scale across our network.

nsi.name: NSI-Monétique
nsi.description: Our founding financial partner, providing the regulatory framework, banking expertise, and monetic infrastructure that gives FinPay Africa its institutional foundation and credibility.

panafricanmobile.name: Pan-African Mobile Network
panafricanmobile.description: Connecting the FinPay platform to mobile wallet ecosystems across Sub-Saharan Africa to ensure last-mile delivery and true financial inclusion for the unbanked population.

africanmerchant.name: African Merchant Alliance
africanmerchant.description: A coalition of merchants and retailers who accept FinPay cards and payment terminals, expanding our on-the-ground footprint across key urban markets throughout Africa.

euroconnect.name: EuroConnect Financial
euroconnect.description: Enabling European-based diaspora communities to send money home seamlessly through compliant, competitively priced corridors that meet EU financial regulations.

securepay.name: SecurePay Technologies
securepay.description: Providing enterprise-grade encryption, real-time fraud detection, and compliance tooling so every FinPay transaction meets the highest international security standards.

diasporaconnect.name: Diaspora Connect Europe
diasporaconnect.description: A community-driven distribution network connecting FinPay services to the African diaspora across France, Belgium, and the UK through trusted community touchpoints.

afrimobile.name: AfriMobile Solutions
afrimobile.description: A specialist in USSD and mobile banking technology, allowing FinPay to reach customers even in regions with limited smartphone penetration.
